EHEWLETT, JUDGE; CGEHLING, CLERK; KBERSAMIN, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED AND WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF BRIAN CANO AND AGAINST DEFENDANT PATRICK OLLIE FOR RESTITUTION/POSSESSION OF 1885 HAYES STREET, SAN FRAN- CISCO, CA TOGETHER WITH $3000.14 PRINCIPAL AND $232.OO COSTS. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT FORM OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLLIE, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1885 HAYES STREET S.F. $3,000.14 RENT, $232.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,232.14, LEASE FORFEITED
